providers.label: CSV source
providers.helper: Select the provider that generated your CSV file.
providers.genericDescription: Configure and map your own columns

dropzone.title: Upload your Revolut CSV
dropzone.dragInactive: Drag and drop your CSV file here, or click to browse
dropzone.privacyNote: Your data stays on your device. Nothing is uploaded to any server.

dateFormat.label: Date format
dateFormat.description: Select the date format used in your CSV file. This is required because dates like 5/1/2026 can be ambiguous.

step1.label: Add CSV
step1.title: Add your bank statement CSV
step1.description: Drag your bank statement CSV into the area below.

step2.label: Date format

step2.description: Review the detected transactions before importing them.

step3.label: View results
step3.title: Import locally
step3.description: We will save your transactions locally and open the dashboard.

preview.title: Date Preview
preview.description: Confirm the parsed dates look correct before importing.
preview.formatMismatch: This format does not match the CSV date value.
preview.impossibleDate: The CSV contains an impossible date.
preview.sourceHasNoDateColumns: This CSV source does not define date columns.
preview.detectedColumnEmpty: The detected date column has no non-empty values.
preview.noConfiguredDateColumn: We couldn't find a configured date column in this CSV.
preview.ambiguousQuestion: Which format does your CSV use?
preview.allInvalid: No dates could be parsed with the selected format. Please try another format.
preview.noTransactions: No valid transactions found in the file

transactionPreview.title: Preview your transactions
transactionPreview.description: Verify the detected data before importing it locally.

demoPreview.title: See how your data will look
demoPreview.description: Preview, review, and categorize your transactions before importing them.

error.title: Import failed
error.generic: Something went wrong while reading the file.

demo.label: Try demo data
demo.description: Explore the dashboard with sample Revolut transaction data.

errors.noTransactions: No valid transactions found in the file
